libcat API is running — the SPA was not built into this binary

The committed backend/ui/dist/ is a placeholder. The cataloging web app is a Svelte SPA that must be built before compiling lcatd, so go:embed can pick it up: 

cd backend/ui && npm ci && npm run build
cd .. && go build ./cmd/lcatd

The JSON API works regardless of this page: /config, /v1/healthz, and the /v1/… routes. The release container image builds the SPA automatically.
